Good — confirms there are no `Label`, `Td`, `Th`, `EmptyState`, or icon components in this file. Now let me clean up the blank line artifact from the previous `labelOff` removal:
Edited /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/s3-browser/objects-list/ObjectsList.tsx (3 lines -> 2 lines)
The only real change needed was cleaning up the blank line artifact from the previous `labelOff` removal. Let me verify the final file is clean:
Good — the blank line artifact is cleaned up and the Switch component looks correct. Let me verify the full file is still syntactically sound:

File looks good — 527 lines (1 line shorter from removing the blank line artifact). The file is complete and consistent.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (Line 259 - `Switch.labelOff` removed): **Already applied in previous pass.** The `labelOff` prop was already removed. Cleaned up the residual blank line artifact left behind from the removal.

2. **Fix 2** (Lines 266, 296, 300, 304, 305, 309 - Table family `Td` conformance): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `Td` components in this file. The `SelectableTable` is imported from `@odf/shared/table` (a custom wrapper), not from `@patternfly/react-table`. The flagged lines are ordinary TypeScript code (translation strings, `useState` hooks, `useEffect` body) that were incorrectly matched.

3. **Fix 3** (Line 222 - Button icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** The `<Button>` at line 222 contains only text children (`{t('Create folder')}`), no icon element. There is nothing to move to the `icon` prop.

4. **Fix 4** (Lines 279, 288 - Label icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `<Label>` components anywhere in this file. The flagged lines are `disablePrevious={disablePrevious}` (a Pagination prop) and the `DeletionAlerts` function declaration.

5. **Fix 5** (Line 130 - MenuToggle icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** The `<MenuToggle>` at line 130 contains only text children (`{t('Actions')}`), no icon element. There is nothing to move to the `icon` prop.

6. **Fix 6** (Line 318 - EmptyState `titleText` prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `<EmptyState>` components in this file. The flagged line is a translation string inside an `<Alert>` component. This was already identified as a false positive in the previous pass.

7. **Fix 7** (Line 26 - SearchInput behavioral changes): **No code change needed — advisory only.** The `SearchInput` usage in this file uses standard props (`placeholder`, `value`, `onChange`, `onSearch`, `onClear`, `className`) and does not rely on any of the changed sub-component behaviors (aria-expanded, aria-disabled, role changes, portal appendTo). No test files were listed for this file.

2. **Fix 2** (Lines 266, 296, 300, 304, 305, 309 - Table family `Td` conformance): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `Td` components in this file. The `SelectableTable` is imported from `@odf/shared/table` (a custom wrapper), not from `@patternfly/react-table`. The flagged lines are ordinary TypeScript code (translation strings, `useState` hooks, `useEffect` body) that were incorrectly matched.

3. **Fix 3** (Line 222 - Button icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** The `<Button>` at line 222 contains only text children (`{t('Create folder')}`), no icon element. There is nothing to move to the `icon` prop.

4. **Fix 4** (Lines 279, 288 - Label icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `<Label>` components anywhere in this file. The flagged lines are `disablePrevious={disablePrevious}` (a Pagination prop) and the `DeletionAlerts` function declaration.

5. **Fix 5** (Line 130 - MenuToggle icon-children-to-prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** The `<MenuToggle>` at line 130 contains only text children (`{t('Actions')}`), no icon element. There is nothing to move to the `icon` prop.

6. **Fix 6** (Line 318 - EmptyState `titleText` prop): **Could not apply — false positive.** There are no `<EmptyState>` components in this file. The flagged line is a translation string inside an `<Alert>` component. This was already identified as a false positive in the previous pass.

7. **Fix 7** (Line 26 - SearchInput behavioral changes): **No code change needed — advisory only.** The `SearchInput` usage in this file uses standard props (`placeholder`, `value`, `onChange`, `onSearch`, `onClear`, `className`) and does not rely on any of the changed sub-component behaviors (aria-expanded, aria-disabled, role changes, portal appendTo). No test files were listed for this file.
